name: go2-initial-test
description: Pre-hackathon hardware self-test for the Unitree Go2: one app per hardware interface (camera, LiDAR, mic, speaker, IMU, foot contact, ultrasonic, battery, motion, LEDs, gimbal, GPU, cloud) plus a dashboard UI that shows a live pass/fail go/no-go board. Motion is manual-trigger only.

variables.name: UI_PORT
variables.description: Port for the test dashboard — open http://<device>:<port> to see the pass/fail board

variables.name: GO2_IP
variables.description: Go2 robot controller IP on the robot LAN — the WebRTC camera/audio target, and the address the DDS services route to in order to auto-detect this host's own bind IP at startup (so there's no separate GO2_DDS_ADDRESS prompt; set GO2_DDS_ADDRESS at runtime only to override).

variables.name: GPU_BASE_IMAGE
variables.description: Base image for the GPU test — must match the Go2's JetPack. Default targets JetPack 6 / L4T r36 (Orin). For a JetPack 5 Go2 use e.g. dustynv/pytorch:2.1-r35.4.1.
variables.prompt: GPU base image (match the Go2's JetPack)

variables.name: CLOUD_HEALTH_URL
variables.description: Wendy Cloud endpoint the cloud tile pings for reachability (a plain GET; gRPC 415/401/403 counts as reachable). Override to point at a different environment.
